languages.text: "Твой путь не приведет тебя к цели. Сей эксперимент нецелесообразен, и его последствия будут ликвидированы здесь и сейчас".
"Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."
languages.original_text: "Твой путь не приведет тебя к цели. Сей эксперимент нецелесообразен, и его последствия будут ликвидированы здесь и сейчас".

traits.locale_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."
"Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."
"Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."
"Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

languages.text: «Tu camino no te llevará a esa meta. Este experimento es completamente irracional y sus repercusiones quedarán purgadas aquí y ahora».
languages.original_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

traits.locale_text: «Tu camino no te llevará a esa meta. Este experimento es completamente irracional y sus repercusiones quedarán purgadas aquí y ahora».

languages.text: “你的道路永远无法抵达目标。这项实验完全违背理性，而它造成的一切后果，都将在此时此地被彻底净化。”
languages.original_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

traits.locale_text: “你的道路永远无法抵达目标。这项实验完全违背理性，而它造成的一切后果，都将在此时此地被彻底净化。”

languages.text: "Euer Weg wird Euch nicht zu Eurem Ziel führen. Das Experiment ist absolut irrational und seine Konsequenzen werden hier und jetzt beseitigt."
languages.original_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Weg wird Euch nicht zu Eurem Ziel führen. Das Experiment ist absolut irrational und seine Konsequenzen werden hier und jetzt beseitigt."

languages.text: « La voie que vous avez choisie ne mène nulle part. Cette expérience est totalement irrationnelle, et ses répercussions vont être étouffées dans l'œuf ici et maintenant. »
languages.original_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

traits.locale_text: « La voie que vous avez choisie ne mène nulle part. Cette expérience est totalement irrationnelle, et ses répercussions vont être étouffées dans l'œuf ici et maintenant. »

languages.text: "Yolunuz sizi hedefinize götürmeyecek. Bu deney tamamen mantıksız. Yansımaları şimdi ve burada arındırılacak."
languages.original_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

traits.locale_text: "Yolunuz sizi hedefinize götürmeyecek. Bu deney tamamen mantıksız. Yansımaları şimdi ve burada arındırılacak."

languages.text: 「君の道は目標にたどり着くものではない。この実験は完全に非合理であり、その影響は今ここで消される。」
languages.original_text: "Your path will not lead you to your goal. This experiment is entirely irrational, and its repercussions will be purged here and now."

traits.locale_text: 「君の道は目標にたどり着くものではない。この実験は完全に非合理であり、その影響は今ここで消される。」
